stocks.impact_theory: Surging oil prices above $102/bbl due to Iran-US conflict and Strait of Hormuz disruptions boost upstream revenues for integrated majors like XOM. Economic implications include higher energy costs fueling inflation fears, delaying Fed cuts. Market psychology: risk-on for energy amid geo-tensions. Historical parallels: 2019 Iran tanker attacks (+10% oil spike). Analogies: like a dam bursting (oil supply constrained), or poker bluff escalating (Trump pause then rebound).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show oil rebound after Trump Iran post uncertainty; X posts highlight positive for upstream oil amid war. High engagement on energy winners.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long XOM for 5-8% gains if oil >$110 sustained.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if de-escalation, potential 3% loss.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Diplomatic resolution dropping oil prices, recession from high energy costs.

stocks.justification: Strong correlation oil-stock, consistent news theme across sources.

stocks.impact_theory: Similar to XOM, Chevron benefits from elevated crude realizations; disruptions hit competitors more (per WSJ). Implications: widens fiscal deficits via subsidies elsewhere. Psychology: flight to quality energy. Parallels: Gulf War 1990 oil shock. Analogies: rising tide lifts oil boats; shadow boxing in Middle East.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Mentioned in WSJ as impacted but resilient; X sentiment positive for oil giants.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Asset impairments from attacks, regulatory scrutiny.

stocks.justification: Direct news hits on Chevron in conflict context.

stocks.impact_theory: Refiners gain from wide crack spreads (high crude, higher products). Implications: offsets some consumer pain. Psychology: value play in volatility. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine war. Analogies: arbitrage in chaos; refinery as oil filter in storm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket gainer; highlighted in oil surge articles.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long MPC for 6-10% if spreads hold.

stocks.justification: Premarket data supports, but refiners volatile.

stocks.impact_theory: High ATF/fuel costs (40% expenses) squeeze margins amid Hormuz closure. Implications: higher fares, demand drop. Psychology: risk-off travel. Parallels: 2022 oil spike (-20% airlines). Analogies: plane grounded by fuel storm; wallet drained by gas guzzler.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts negative for aviation; autos/air hit by Hormuz.

stocks.impact_theory: Geo-tensions accelerate defense orders (F-35, missiles). Implications: budget hikes. Psychology: safe haven defense. Parallels: post-9/11 boom. Analogies: arms race ignition; fortress in turmoil.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X positive for defense PSUs; US equivalent benefits.

stocks.justification: Indirect but logical from war news.
